findings.evidence: Lines 34-38 prove exactly `(_root_.FundamentalGroup.map f a₀).range = ⊥` using `(_root_.FundamentalGroup.map f a₀).subsingleton_coe_range`, then finish with `bot_le`; `rg` shows this is the only exported theorem in the new file.
findings.fix: State the natural theorem first, e.g. `(_root_.FundamentalGroup.map f a₀).range = ⊥` under `[SimplyConnectedSpace A]`, and derive the `mapOfEq` inclusion as a corollary only if needed.
findings.issue: `FundamentalGroup.map_range_le_mapOfEq_range_of_simplyConnectedSpace` specializes the result to a `mapOfEq` range even though `p`, `e₀`, and `he` only provide an arbitrary target subgroup for `bot_le`.

summary: The remaining additive theorem is under-generalized: it packages a general simply-connected fundamental-group fact only for one `mapOfEq` lifting-condition target.
